communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

This is a request for public records.

Please provide all records, in any format (including audio, video, written, electronic, and digital records) relating to 911 calls, non-emergency calls, dispatch communications, or other police activity involving phone number 720-799-5294 and/or the address 2362 Shenandoah Rd, Palm Bay, FL 32905, occurring between September 9, 2023 and September 14, 2023.

This request includes records received, logged, transferred, handled, generated, or referenced by your agency, regardless of whether a police response ultimately occurred.

Specifically, please include:

1. Phone Call Recordings

Audio recordings of all 911 calls placed from 720-799-5294 during the specified time period

Audio recordings of non-emergency calls placed to or received by your agency from 720-799-5294

Audio recordings of any transferred calls or call-backs between dispatch, officers, or other agencies

2. Call Logs & Metadata

Call logs showing the date, time, and duration of each call

Call-taker or dispatcher notes

Call classification and disposition codes

Incident, event, or case numbers associated with each call

3. Dispatch & CAD Records

All CAD entries and calls for service associated with phone number 720-799-5294

All CAD entries and calls for service associated with the address 2362 Shenandoah Rd, Palm Bay, FL 32905 during the requested period

Dispatch notes and time-stamped activity logs

Unit assignments, dispatch decisions, and response actions

4. Radio & Dispatch Communications

Audio recordings of dispatch radio traffic and unit-to-unit radio communications related to these calls or the address

5. Body Camera & Dash Camera Footage

All body-worn camera footage and dash camera footage associated with CAD calls or calls for service involving the phone number or address during the specified time period

6. Related Reports

Any incident reports, offense reports, or supplemental reports generated as a result of these calls or calls for service

Please include all responsive records regardless of whether an officer was dispatched, an arrest occurred, or a report was finalized.

If any records are withheld or redacted, please identify the specific statutory exemption relied upon and provide the non-exempt portions.

If any responsive records have been destroyed, lost, or no longer exist, please provide documentation reflecting that fact.

Please provide records in electronic format where available.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Ashley Kautz
